title: athyrium × pokharense
intro: Athyrium × pokharense, also known as Pokharense Lady Fern, is a hybrid fern species that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating urinary issues and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Athyrium × pokharense include its ability to help manage kidney stones, improve digestion, and lower blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of tea, tincture, or dried leaves, and its medicinal properties can also be extracted through decoction or infusion.
